final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean web UI mockup, bright and airy aesthetic, feminine skincare brand direction, soft gradients, modern sans-serif typography
Composition: desktop browser viewport layout, three-column hero section (left text / center model / right product), generous whitespace, grid-based alignment
Subject: hero section featuring "LUMEA BEAUTY" brand, young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek while holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, two product items (serum dropper bottle + packaging box)
Scene/backdrop: soft pink (#F8E8E8) and white gradient background, subtle floral accents with purple flowers in corners, clean minimal environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and welcoming atmosphere, professional product photography feel
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, gold accents for stat cards, warm skin tones
Materials/textures: smooth glass dropper bottle, matte packaging box, soft skin texture, floating white rounded stat cards with subtle shadows
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must display all navigation elements and CTA buttons clearly; text must remain legible at web viewing sizes; layout must balance three columns harmoniously
Avoid: cluttered layout, dark mode, harsh shadows, neon colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, broken Japanese typography
